headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on IQVIA Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $185
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Elizabeth Anderson   maintains IQVIA Holdings (NYSE:IQV) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $225 to $185.
